top.head: Look at all of the new features you’ve been missing out on
top.text: IQ Option wastes no time when it comes to improvement and innovation

iq.title: IQ OPTION 4.0
iq.text: The new and improved version of the trading platform is lightning-fast, has an array of new indicators and stores 2 years worth of quotes!

sell.title: Selling options before expiry
sell.text: The price went in the wrong direction? No problem! Just sell the option back to us and secure your capital.

robo.title: Trading Robots
robo.text: Automate your profit with over 500 ready-made trading robots or build your own.

asset.title: New Assets
asset.text: Widen your horizons, trading our newest exciting assets: Bitcoins, Nintendo, USD/SEK and many more.

profit.title: Higher Profitability
profit.text: How about a 90% profitability on EUR/USD? With IQ Option, everything is possible.

cta.text: Are you ready to check out the progress we’ve made?
